title: Unlock New Opportunities with Local Builder Partnerships
subtitle: Learn how to forge strong relationships with local builders to secure a steady stream of referrals and grow your mortgage business.
keyTakeaways: Identify and approach local builders with active projects.
Position yourself as a problem-solver for financing needs.
Develop a builder-focused loan guide using UFF products.
Showcase seamless loan processes via UFF's PRO Portal.

sections.heading: The Power of Builder Partnerships
sections.body: Local builders are in constant need of reliable financing solutions to close sales for their clients. By establishing a solid partnership, you can become their go-to mortgage broker, ensuring a steady stream of business referrals.
bullets: Research top local builders with active projects.
Highlight your role in supporting builder sales.

sections.heading: Effective Strategies to Engage Builders
sections.body: Engage local builders by presenting yourself as a trusted partner. Focus on how you can assist their clients with tailored financing options, emphasizing your expertise in construction loans.
bullets: Schedule meetings to discuss financing needs.
Tailor solutions to builder and client needs.

sections.heading: Leverage UFF's Construction Loan Expertise
sections.body: Create a comprehensive builder-focused loan guide that highlights UFF's new construction loan offerings. Use the PRO Portal to showcase how you manage the submission and approval process efficiently, instilling confidence in your capabilities.
bullets: Utilize UFF products in your loan guide.
Demonstrate streamlined processes via PRO Portal.

metaDescription: Cultivate local builder partnerships for consistent referrals. Leverage UFF's construction loan expertise efficiently.
